CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Smoothly return to center, level flight.
CONTROLS.NAME: recenter

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Forward flight speed in units per second.
CONTROLS.NAME: fly_speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How far the camera sees before fading to sky.
CONTROLS.NAME: draw_distance

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Minimum flight altitude above the surface.
CONTROLS.NAME: min_height

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun azimuth around Mars (0–1 = full 360° rotation).
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_angle

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun height above horizon — low values cast long shadows across ridges.
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_elevation

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Scale of terrain features — higher values create larger mountain ranges and deeper canyons, lower values create smaller rocky detail.
CONTROLS.NAME: terrain_scale

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Density of the low-lying dust haze.
CONTROLS.NAME: fog_density

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Intensity of the horizon scatter glow.
CONTROLS.NAME: scatter_amount

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Blend of previous frame — creates motion trails and temporal smoothing.
CONTROLS.NAME: motion_blur

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How strongly bass pulses the diffuse lighting.
CONTROLS.NAME: bass_reactivity

DESCRIPTION: Fly over Martian terrain. Derivative-warped FBM canyons and ridges with dust haze and horizon glow. Inspired by Sirenian Dawn by nimitz.
TITLE: Mars
